quote: Life goes by very fast. And the worst thing in life that you can have is a job that you hate, and have no energy and creativity in.
formatted_quote: "Life goes by very fast. And the worst thing in life that you can have is a job that you hate, and have no energy and creativity in." - Robert Greene
